analysis.reasoning: Core message: A Chinese diplomat thanks a supporter and states that China and Europe often misunderstand each other; diplomats should find common interests, bridge understanding, and promote peace and cooperation; he will continue efforts. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not promoted; no criticism of the West, only acknowledgment of mutual understanding challenges. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes; the tweet emphasizes promoting peace, cooperation, bridging gaps, and finding common interests—portraying China's diplomatic role as cooperative and peace-oriented. CH3 (epic history): Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values in domestic context): Not addressed; no mention of political system or domestic governance values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): Not claimed; no achievements or superiority asserted. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: Only CH2 applies.
